overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European-style town. The character moves from a stone courtyard through a dark shop interior, emerges into a sunlit market square, ascends wooden stairs to an elevated walkway, and explores connected rooms before returning to the exterior balcony.

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval stone courtyard with weathered walls and wooden balconies. A forge fire glows in the background archway while NPCs stand near a wooden platform and stairs on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit shop interior with goods and fireplace

interior illuminated by warm orange glow from fireplace

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark shop interior through a wooden doorway. Inside, wooden floors and stone walls surround crates of vegetables while a warm fireplace glow illuminates the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with merchant tents

events.description: exits dark shop into bright sunlit market square

agents.ego_description: emerging from shop into bustling market area with tents

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark shop into a bright sunlit market square filled with canvas tents and merchant stalls. Half-timbered houses surround the cobblestone plaza as NPCs walk through the area.

events.description: begins ascending steep wooden staircase to upper level

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through the market crowd and begins ascending a steep wooden staircase. The cobblestone ground gives way to wooden steps as timber-framed buildings rise in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden balcony with view of market below

wooden table with plates and food remains near the railing

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated wooden walkway with weathered planks, overlooking the bustling market square below. A man leans on the railing enjoying the view while an outdoor table sits nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior room with stone walls and storage barrels

events.description: enters interior room from elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: entering room with stone walls and stacked wooden barrels

entered.detail: rough stone block walls with mortar joints
stack of wooden barrels with metal bands in the corner
wooden table with plates, bottles, and food items

segments.scene_description: The character enters an interior room from the walkway, revealing stone walls and a wooden floor. Stacked barrels sit in the corner while a table holds plates and bottles, illuminated by sunlight through windows.

events.description: exits room back to elevated wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: returning to wooden walkway and continuing along building exterior

entered.detail: dark wooden building wall with small windows and overhang

segments.scene_description: Exiting the room back to the elevated wooden walkway, continuing along the exterior of the dark wooden building with views of the distant timber houses and market below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a weathered stone courtyard through a dim interior and out into a bustling, sunlit medieval town. It begins by passing through a stone courtyard with a glowing forge before moving through a wooden doorway into a dark shop filled with vegetable crates and the warmth of a fireplace. As the character emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a bright market square characterized by cobblestones, canvas tents, and half-timbered houses. The camera then ascends a steep wooden staircase, leaving the crowd behind to reach an elevated walkway overlooking the plaza. Finally, the view shifts briefly into a sunlit room with stacked barrels and bottles before returning to the weathered planks of the exterior balcony.
